title: .chezmoidata.toml
description: Schema for the dotfiles project's root .chezmoidata.toml file. Catches typos in feature flags, profile names, and tool selections at PR time.

dotfiles_version.description: Semver-style version string. Single source of truth synchronised by version-sync.sh.

profile.description: Active profile name (e.g. laptop, desktop, server). Custom values allowed.

machine.description: Machine preset key from .chezmoidata/hardware.toml. Empty string for generic / no preset.

default_shell.description: Default interactive shell. Must match an installable shell on the target platform.

name.description: Git author name. Empty if set via chezmoi init prompts or per-host override.

email.description: Git author email. Empty if set via chezmoi init prompts or per-host override.

signingkey.description: SSH or GPG signing key reference for signed commits.

features.description: Feature flags. All values must be boolean.

buckets.description: Per-bucket alias toggles. All values must be boolean.
